chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1032 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 03.03.2025 Mr. Irfan Aziz, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh This petition is pending since 2020 remains listed for orders as to maintainability ever since. Perusal of the prayer clause demonstrates that petition seeks to assert propriety rights in respect of immoveable property which could not be entertained in writ jurisdiction. Even otherwise factual controversies are raised which could not be adjudicated without recourse to evidence etc. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
